children.heading: Estimates of annual appropriations
children.label: a Estimates of annual appropriations
children.text: The Director shall prepare the estimates of the annual appropriations required to be made to the fund.

children.heading: Actuarial valuations
children.label: b Actuarial valuations
children.text: The Director shall cause to be made actuarial valuations of the fund at such intervals as the Director determines to be necessary, but not less often than every five years.

children.heading: Changes in law affecting actuarial status of fund
children.label: c Changes in law affecting actuarial status of fund

children.text: new or increased benefits payable from the fund under this subchapter, including annuity increases other than under ;section 2131 of this title
extension of the coverage of this subchapter to new groups of employees; or
increases in pay on which benefits are computed;

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: d Authorization
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated to the fund for each fiscal year such amounts as may be necessary to meet the amount of normal cost for each year that is not met by contributions under .section 2021(a) of this title

children.heading: Unfunded liability; credit allowed for military service
children.label: e Unfunded liability; credit allowed for military service

children.text: interest on the unfunded liability computed for that year at the interest rate used in the then most recent valuation of the system; and
that portion of disbursement for annuities for that year that the Director estimates is attributable to credit allowed for military service,
